synergy:setting-entity-tick-lod-tooltip: 基于距离降低非玩家实体的Tick频率
synergy:setting-entity-spawn-budget-tool: 帧预算化生成处理，消除传送/登录卡顿
synergy:setting-chunk-priority-tooltip: 优先处理近处区块以加快世界加载感知速度
synergy:setting-position-throttle-toolti: 减少远处实体位置数据包的处理
synergy:setting-block-tick-pool-tooltip: 消除随机方块Tick循环中的BlockPos分配
synergy:setting-pathfinding-cache-toolti: 为寻路到相似目的地的实体提供短期结果共享
synergy:setting-network-flush-tooltip: 将小数据包合并为更少的网络帧
synergy:setting-inventory-scan-tooltip: 无变更时跳过完整背包遍历
synergy:setting-block-tick-falloff-toolt: 降低范围边缘的Tick频率（略微改变原版行为）
synergy:setting-server-hints-tooltip: 向客户端发送服务器负载数据以进行自适应优化
synergy:setting-tracking-hysteresis-tool: 缓冲区防止实体在视距边界闪烁
synergy:setting-send-frequency-tooltip: 将远处实体的位置数据包频率从30 Hz降低到15 Hz
synergy:setting-attribute-resync-tooltip: 将不必要的完整重同步转换为轻量级增量更新
synergy:setting-spawn-priority-tooltip: 按距离排序实体生成，近处实体优先出现
synergy:setting-activation-range-tooltip: Skip ticking distant entities to reduce server CPU usage
synergy:setting-collision-fast-path-tool: Skip collision checks for stationary entities with no environmental flags
